debloat_ui.ready: Sparkle is installed and ready to launch.
debloat_ui.will_download: Sparkle will be downloaded from GitHub on first launch — portable, no installation.
debloat_ui.windows_only: Sparkle Debloat is only supported on Windows.

features.title: Remove bloatware
features.text: Uninstalls preinstalled apps and OEM junk you never asked for.

features.title: Privacy & telemetry
features.text: Disables tracking, telemetry and advertising services.

features.title: Performance tweaks
features.text: Trims background services and startup load for a snappier PC.

features.title: Portable from GitHub
features.text: Fetched from the official Sparkle releases on first launch — nothing to install.

activation_ui.ready_hint: Ready — one click to download and run.

cleaner_ui.title: System Cleaner
cleaner_ui.scan_full: Full scan completed with administrator access.
cleaner_ui.scan_limited: Limited scan. Protected items need admin — cleaned when you press Clean.
cleaner_ui.cleaned_refreshed: Cleaned. Sizes refreshed with administrator access.

temp.title: Clean Temporary Files
temp.description: Remove system and user temporary files.

prefetch.title: Clean Prefetch Files
prefetch.description: Delete files from the Windows Prefetch folder.

recycle_bin.title: Empty Recycle Bin
recycle_bin.description: Permanently remove files from the Recycle Bin.

windows_update.title: Clean Windows Update Cache
windows_update.description: Remove Windows Update downloaded installation files.

thumbnail_cache.title: Clear Thumbnail Cache
thumbnail_cache.description: Remove cached thumbnail images used by File Explorer.

error_reports.title: Clear Error Reports
error_reports.description: Remove error report and crash dump files.

general.not_implemented: This will completely remove Spicetify and restore Spotify to its original state.

pages.spicetify_desc: Add themes and customizations to Spotify for a more personalized listening experience
pages.install_desc: Download and install your favorite apps automatically. Just select what you need and let the program do the rest!
pages.maintenance_desc: Clean up and optimize your system for faster and more stable performance
pages.debloat_raphi_desc: Downloads and runs the Sparkle debloat and optimization tool. This powerful open‑source utility removes built‑in bloatware and tunes your Windows PC for better performance and privacy. Administrator rights and an internet connection are required. Proceed with caution.
pages.crack_desc: Complete installation of popular software like Photoshop, Office, and more - ready to use right away. May require administrator privileges.
pages.activate_desc: Activate Windows and set up password-free auto login - quick and simple
pages.debloat_desc: Remove unwanted programs and optimize Windows settings for better performance and enhanced privacy

messages.bios_instructions: Restart into BIOS for advanced hardware settings. Make sure to save all your work before proceeding!
bios_steps: Save all your work and close applications
BIOS/UEFI setup will open on boot
messages.installation_started: Installation started! Follow the instructions in the installer window.
messages.install_spicetify_success: Spicetify installed successfully! Restart Spotify to see the changes.
messages.full_uninstall_spotify_success: Spotify completely removed from your computer!
messages.admin_warning: This operation requires administrator privileges and will restart your computer immediately.
messages.oauth_not_configured: Login unavailable: OAuth credentials are not configured.

maintenance.patch_my_pc_desc: Automatically update all installed applications with one click
maintenance.thumbnail_cache_desc: Clear icon and thumbnail cache files
maintenance.error_reports_desc: Clean crash dumps and error reports
maintenance.network_reset_desc: Reset Winsock, IP stack, and flush DNS
